title: Add Edge Case and Error Handling Tests
description: Expand test coverage for edge cases and error handling scenarios across installer modules. Add tests for: null/undefined inputs, file system errors (ENOENT, EACCES), network timeouts, corrupted files, partial installations. Follow TESTING_GUIDE.md quality assurance patterns including mutation testing checklist.

criteria: 15+ new edge case tests added across all installer test files
Error handling tests cover: ENOENT, EACCES, ENOSPC, EINVAL
Null/undefined input tests for all public functions
Mutation testing checklist applied to critical functions
convergence.definition_of_done: All installer modules have comprehensive edge case and error handling coverage

files.change: Add edge case tests: null versions, malformed semver, file read errors
Add error handling tests: ENOENT, EACCES, disk full, permission denied
Add edge case tests: empty files, corrupted content, missing directories
Add integration edge cases: partial install recovery, concurrent operations

implementation.title: Add version-manager edge cases
implementation.description: Add edge case tests for version-manager: null/undefined versions, malformed semver strings, file system errors
modification_points: Add describe('Edge Cases') block with 5+ tests
Test compareVersions with null, undefined, empty string
Test malformed versions: '1', '1.0', '1.0.0.0', 'a.b.c'
Test file read errors: ENOENT, EACCES
Test version file with whitespace, BOM
logic_flow: Add new describe block to existing test file
Create test cases following TESTING_GUIDE.md patterns
Mock fs errors with mockImplementationOnce
Verify error handling returns null or appropriate default
Test boundary values: 0.0.0, 999.999.999

implementation.title: Add file-copier error handling tests
implementation.description: Add error handling tests for file-copier: file system errors, permission issues, disk space
modification_points: Add describe('Error Handling') block with 5+ tests
Test copyFile with ENOENT source, EACCES destination
Test copyDirectory with partial failures
Test restoreBackup with missing backup file
Test cleanBackups with permission denied
logic_flow: Mock fs methods to throw errors
Test each error type: ENOENT, EACCES, ENOSPC, EISDIR
Verify error messages are descriptive
Test partial failure scenarios (some files fail)
Verify backups array correctly populated on error

implementation.title: Add validator edge cases
implementation.description: Add edge case tests for validator: empty files, corrupted content, missing directories
modification_points: Add describe('Edge Cases') block with 5+ tests
Test validateFile with empty file (size=0)
Test validateTypeScriptFile with syntax error markers
Test validateInstallation with partial file set
Test validateVersionFile with invalid formats
logic_flow: Mock fs to return empty or corrupted content
Test REQUIRED_FILES validation with missing items
Test version format validation: 'invalid', '1', '1.0.0-beta'
Test getInstalledFiles with symlinks, hidden files
Verify all error paths return valid=false with descriptive error

implementation.title: Add installer integration edge cases
implementation.description: Add integration edge cases to installer.test.js: partial install recovery, concurrent operations
modification_points: Add describe('Recovery Scenarios') block to installer.test.js
Test install recovery after partial failure
Test rollback with incomplete backups
Test update interruption and recovery
Test uninstall with locked files
logic_flow: Create scenarios with intentional failures mid-operation
Test getStatus after partial install
Verify rollback handles missing backups gracefully
Test concurrent install calls (should serialize)
Document expected behavior for each edge case

implementation.title: Apply mutation testing checklist
implementation.description: Review all tests against TESTING_GUIDE.md mutation testing checklist to ensure tests catch real bugs
modification_points: Review each test: would changing source code break the test?
Add assertions for critical return values
Verify error messages are tested, not just presence of error
Document any gaps in test coverage
logic_flow: For each describe block, apply mutation checklist
If test doesn't catch mutation, add assertion
Ensure boundary values tested at edges
Verify mock calls verify correct arguments
Document test quality score

pre_analysis.action: Load TESTING_GUIDE.md for mutation testing checklist
Load existing test files to extend

artifacts.usage: Mutation testing checklist and quality assurance patterns

context: Base unit tests for installer modules created

rationale.edge_case_priority: Edge cases often hide critical bugs - comprehensive coverage prevents production issues
rationale.mutation_testing: Ensures tests actually verify behavior, not just pass

risks: Some edge cases may be impossible to simulate in Jest - document as known limitations
